arts.sum: Ipswich will aim to put space between themselves and the relegation places when Brighton arrive at Portman Road this evening. Kieran McKenna’s team have breathed new life into their survival battle with four points from their last two games. arts.ttl: Chelsea to make ENORMOUS profit as Brighton target January transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea centre-back Tosin Adarabioyo has struggled to make an impression for Enzo Maresca, but with Brighton seeking to sign the former Fulham star, he could give the club’s bank balance a huge boost. Tosin joined Chelsea as a free agent in the summer in what was a surprising move given that he is 27, therefore going against the club’s typical signing model, and possessed no previous experience at a top club.

arts.ttl: Ipswich sign winger Philogene from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Ipswich Town have completed the signing of winger Jaden Philogene from Aston Villa on a four-and-a-half-year deal. During his time at Hull, Philogene scored 12 goals and registered 6 assists in 32 appearances including an incredible Rabona finish that was later nominated for a Puskas Award.

arts.ttl: Ipswich sign winger Philogene from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Ipswich complete the signing of winger Jaden Philogene from Aston Villa for a fee in the region of £20m.

Aston Villa can confirm Jaden Philogene has joined Ipswich Town for an undisclosed fee. The winger, an Academy graduate, made a total of 21 senior appearances in all competitions across two spells with the club. Philogene enjoyed his first-team debut for Villa in 2021 and spent time on loan at Stoke City and Cardiff City before joining Hull City on a permanent deal in 2023, later returning to Villa Park in July 2024. Everyone at Aston Villa would like to thank Jaden for his service to the club and wish him all the very best in his future career.
